full_text:
Kong Xian 孔羨
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Kong Xian (孔羨). Descendant of Confucius who was enfeoffed by Cao Pi for the purpose of offering sacrifice to Confucius. Kong Xian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
